name: Traveling Gal's Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place dates in a small bowl. Sprinkle with baking soda; add hot water. Let stand 5 to 10 minutes to plump dates.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream sugar and butter or margarine together. Add eggs. Beat well again.
4. Sift flour, salt, and cocoa together. Add dry ingredients to sugar-butter mixture in small amounts, alternating with date mixture.
5. Add vanilla and mix well. Fold in 1/2 cup of chocolate chips.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9 x 13 x 2 inches baking pan. Sprinkle remaining chocolate chips and chopped nuts over top.
7. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
